decision_point: In an adult with a comminuted, displaced Mason type III radial head fracture blocking motion, is surgery (fixation or replacement) or nonoperative management preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with a comminuted, displaced Mason type III radial head fracture blocking motion, is surgery (fixation or replacement) or nonoperative management preferred?
Options:
  1. Surgery (fixation or replacement)
  2. Nonoperative management
label: settled
label_rationale: A displaced, motion-blocking comminuted radial head requires surgery; the fixation-versus-replacement choice is the sub-debate.
